top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Mideast Oil Revival Gathers Pace as Qatar Sells Crude to Asia
top_signals.summary: Qatar has joined Persian Gulf nations in reviving crude sales, as regional producers crank up activity following the US-Iran interim peace deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rate hikes needed very few months, hawkish BOJ board member says
top_signals.summary: While the remarks suggest another rate hike may come earlier than BOJ watchers expect, they also show there is some caution around raising rates again in July.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Consulting giants face up to AI-reckoning
top_signals.summary: Shares in major consultancy firms have dropped sharply as investors fret over the impact of AI on the industry. Maria Ward-Brennan and Rosie Harris-Davison look at whether the threat is real. A bloodbath is unfolding across the professional services sector as artificial intelligence (AI) hammers the shares of global consulting giants like Accenture, IBM and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: StanChart's Liu: PBOC Tightening Unlikely
top_signals.summary: Becky Liu, Head of Greater China Strategy and Asia Rates at Standard Chartered Bank, discusses China's central bank policy shift. She speaks on "Bloomberg: The China Show."  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s Woes Could Be Compounded by $10 Billion Options Expiry
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin is facing a massive options expiry that could put more pressure on a market already struggling with fading institutional demand and macroeconomic headwinds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
